title: TopP&R: Robust Support Estimation Approach for Evaluating Fidelity and Diversity in Generative Models
venue_full: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
one_liner: Topological precision and recall that fix what FID and P&R quietly overlook — the support estimate itself.
tldr: FID, IS, and precision-recall all rest on supports estimated from sample features, but nobody checks whether those supports are reliable. TopP&R keeps only topologically and statistically significant features, giving fidelity and diversity scores stable under outliers and non-IID noise.
